title: Opening for Production Engineer at Procter & Gamble India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Procter & Gamble India
jsonLd.description:
Procter & Gamble India has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Procter & Gamble India:
Procter & Gamble India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Procter & Gamble India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
